title: Surgeries | Greg Smith
meta_description: Greg holds regular help and advice surgeries around the constituency. See below the list of surgeries taking place throughout 2026 across Mid Buckinghamshire:
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
text_excerpt: Surgeries | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact Surgeries Tweet Greg holds regular help and advice surgeries around the constituency. See below the list of surgeries taking place throughout 2026 across Mid Buckinghamshire: 15th May - Stokenchurch 19th June - Brill 17th July - Prestwood 21st August - East Claydon 18th September - Naphill 20th November - Waddesdon 18th December - Princes Risborough To book an appointment please email: [email protected] or call 020 7219 4287 . Greg also holds a series of less formal "pint of view" pub surgeries for local residents to let him know what's on their minds.
